scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @council/backend && npm run build --workspace @council/frontend && npm run build --workspace @council/shared
scripts.check: npm run check --workspace @council/backend && npm run check --workspace @council/frontend && npm run check --workspace @council/shared
